intro_sentences.en: Let's study the verb to see.
intro_sentences.es-ES: Vamos a estudiar el verbo ver.

sample_sentences.en: The verb to see is common in daily speech.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: O verbo ver é comum na fala do dia a dia.
sample_sentences.es-ES: El verbo ver es común en el habla diaria.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Le verbe voir est courant dans la langue quotidienne.

sample_sentences.en: I see the mountains from here.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Yo veo las montañas desde aquí.

sample_sentences.en: He sees his friends every weekend.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Ele vê os amigos todo fim de semana.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Él ve a sus amigos cada fin de semana.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Il voit ses amis chaque week-end.

sample_sentences.en: It sees movement in the dark.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Il voit du mouvement dans le noir.

sample_sentences.en: We see each other on Mondays.
You all see the same screen.
They see the city lights at night.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Eles veem as luzes da cidade à noite.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Ellos ven las luces de la ciudad por la noche.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Ils voient les lumières de la ville la nuit.
